nodes.name: Rhythm Driver
nodes.description: Build a Sunday rhythm that raises race pace while conceding one-lap sharpness.
drawbacks: The higher race expectation self-taxes results.

nodes.name: Telemetry Habit
nodes.description: Calibrate the career pace anchor faster at the cost of public charisma.

nodes.name: Qualifying Sequence
nodes.description: Specialize in assembling a fast qualifying lap without adding physical car pace.

nodes.name: Setup Feedback Loop
nodes.description: Trade a little weight for lower drag through disciplined setup feedback.

nodes.name: Race-Pace Program
nodes.description: Raise the Sunday pace bar while sacrificing grid identity and bonus XP.

nodes.name: Aero Balance Map
nodes.description: Exchange power and tyre comfort for a cleaner low-drag aero map.

nodes.name: Complete-Lap Craft
nodes.description: Raise both race and qualifying expectations with an explicit XP tax.

nodes.name: Powertrain Exploitation
nodes.description: Trade drag and mistake avoidance for a small power advantage.

nodes.name: The Perfect Lap
nodes.description: Become a spectacular Saturday specialist with a volatile Sunday ceiling.

nodes.name: Total Performance
nodes.description: Accept a costly public and contract burden for a net-positive car capstone.

nodes.name: Clean Overtaker
nodes.description: Favor controlled attacking moves over defensive stubbornness.

nodes.name: Defensive Lines
nodes.description: Build a race-day defense at the expense of attack and one-lap identity.

nodes.name: First-Lap Reader
nodes.description: React faster at the start while accepting more volatility and evaluation blame.

nodes.name: Pressure Absorption
nodes.description: Earn a more forgiving error evaluation by becoming less aggressive.

nodes.name: Switchback School
nodes.description: Drive more assertively while accepting mistake and injury risk.

nodes.name: Damage Limitation
nodes.description: Reduce the career impact of mistakes by giving up power and peak XP.

nodes.name: Traffic Mastery
nodes.description: Strengthen close-racing identity while weakening clear-air qualifying and increasing blame.

nodes.name: Closing Laps
nodes.description: Bank consistent late-race finishes for reputation while reducing aggression and podium XP.

nodes.name: Grandmaster of Traffic
nodes.description: Project a dominant traffic identity with explicit injury, error, and blame risk.

nodes.name: Untouchable
nodes.description: Maximize evaluation protection through conservative driving and a real power loss.

nodes.name: Core Strength
nodes.description: Build stamina through a small physical weight tradeoff.
drawbacks: Stamina remains expectation data for a human driver.

nodes.name: Recovery Habits
nodes.description: Improve injury durability while slowing public momentum.

nodes.name: Heat Conditioning
nodes.description: Extend endurance while accepting fine-control volatility.

nodes.name: Rehab Discipline
nodes.description: Prioritize availability over fame and contract momentum.

nodes.name: Endurance Base
nodes.description: Build stamina around a low-drag, low-power setup exchange.

nodes.name: Career Longevity
nodes.description: Slow decline with a weight and reputation cost.

nodes.name: Peak Preservation
nodes.description: Delay the peak at the cost of ultimate stat ceiling and offer momentum.

nodes.name: Marathon Engine
nodes.description: Build maximum endurance around a drag-for-weight car exchange.

nodes.name: Ageless Competitor
nodes.description: Create a long plateau by accepting a lower ceiling, heavier car, and slower legacy.

nodes.name: Indestructible
nodes.description: Maximize availability and late-career offers at the expense of pace and legacy.

nodes.name: Consistency King
nodes.description: Retain form and project consistency while making every OPI movement slower.
drawbacks: Positive breakthroughs also move OPI more slowly.

effects.note: Higher retention damps both positive and negative OPI movement.

nodes.name: Streaky
nodes.description: Let both strong and weak form arrive quickly through lower OPI retention.
drawbacks: Bad form arrives rapidly; retention floor is 0.65.

effects.note: Lower retention accelerates both positive and negative OPI movement.

nodes.name: Student of the Craft
nodes.description: Learn fastest through midfield work and mechanical setbacks rather than headline results.

nodes.name: Momentum Rider
nodes.description: Accelerate positive OPI gains while amplifying both gains and losses in round reputation.
drawbacks: Negative round reputation is also amplified by 15%.

effects.note: First-wave numeric tuning for the authored faster gain-side direction.
Multiplies signed reputation, so failures and successes both accelerate.

nodes.name: Metronome
nodes.description: Dampen form changes even further while projecting repeatable performance.
drawbacks: Positive OPI movement is further suppressed.

effects.note: Higher retention damps positive and negative OPI movement.

nodes.name: Early Brilliance
nodes.description: Peak brightly before the aging curve and retain a sharper qualifying identity afterward.
drawbacks: The era-shaped identity is permanent after purchase.

nodes.name: Race Reader
nodes.description: Earn a forgiving mistake evaluation through a conservative driving identity.

nodes.name: Adversity Engine
nodes.description: Learn from expectation misses and mechanical failures while giving up headline XP.
drawbacks: Underperformance can reduce applied round XP to zero; lifetime XP never falls.

effects.note: Drops the applied underperformance floor to zero without permitting lifetime XP loss.

nodes.name: Zen Master
nodes.description: Stabilize blame and form by sacrificing XP from every round.
drawbacks: Blame floor is 0.70; retention cap is 0.90.

nodes.name: Relentless Mind
nodes.description: Accelerate all round learning and emotional momentum, including failures.
drawbacks: Negative round reputation is amplified by 15%
Aggregate XP multiplier is capped at 1.40.

effects.note: Multiplies signed reputation, amplifying success and failure.

nodes.name: Sponsor Magnet
nodes.description: Bring a portable sponsor budget into contract evaluations.
drawbacks: Works-team marketability and salary stigma still apply.

nodes.name: Cheap Contract
nodes.description: Improve affordability in offer evaluation by accepting lower pay and visibility.

effects.note: Applies to the salary-ask component of offer evaluation.

nodes.name: Mercenary
nodes.description: Accelerate personal leverage and salary while sacrificing loyalty and legacy.

effects.note: First-wave numeric tuning for the authored faster gain-side direction.

nodes.name: Company Man
nodes.description: Trade compensation for organizational trust and a stronger season legacy.

nodes.name: Prima Donna
nodes.description: Convert celebrity into pay at the cost of demands and consistency.

nodes.name: Contract Negotiator
nodes.description: Raise the offered salary while narrowing the teams willing to meet the ask.
drawbacks: Richer demands narrow the viable team pool.

nodes.name: Brand Empire
nodes.description: Build portable commercial value while increasing demands and works-team stigma.
drawbacks: Portable sponsor bonus is capped at +5 BU.

nodes.name: Paddock Fixture
nodes.description: Turn experience into seat security while accepting lower pay and legacy growth.

nodes.name: Commercial Titan
nodes.description: Use a commercial empire to relax one reputation tier while demanding premium terms.
benefits: Reputation floor relaxed by one tier
drawbacks: All aggregate hard caps still apply.

effects.note: A negative tier delta relaxes the required floor; the aggregate relaxation is capped at one tier.

nodes.name: Boardroom Favorite
nodes.description: Maximize late-career seat security rather than wealth or fame.
benefits: Reputation floor relaxed by one tier

effects.note: A negative tier delta relaxes the required floor; the aggregate relaxation is capped at one tier.

nodes.name: Rain Man
nodes.description: Build a wet-weather power and skill identity with a dry-condition cost.

nodes.name: Sunshine Specialist
nodes.description: Optimize dry-condition power while becoming vulnerable in the wet.

nodes.name: Tyre Whisperer
nodes.description: Trade short-race drag for long-race efficiency and tyre-management identity.

nodes.name: Fuel Saver
nodes.description: Reduce long-race weight and strengthen fuel-management identity at a short-race power cost.

nodes.name: Weather Reader
nodes.description: Let anomalous conditions recalibrate the pace anchor much faster.

effects.note: The faster calibration is also more responsive to anomalous rounds.

nodes.name: Thermal Window
nodes.description: Pair tyre and fuel discipline with a race-length-dependent drag exchange.

nodes.name: Storm Chaser
nodes.description: Build a low-drag storm setup that carries a smaller dry-condition penalty.
drawbacks: The wet path remains subject to aggregate CAR-envelope audits.

nodes.name: Endurance Alchemist
nodes.description: Turn long-race preparation into power and endurance at a short-race cost.

nodes.name: Master of Elements
nodes.description: Convert wet-weather performance into reputation and XP without another CAR scalar.

nodes.name: Race Economist
nodes.description: Convert long-race execution into reputation and XP while sacrificing short-race returns.

nodes.name: Team Player
nodes.description: Earn organizational trust and a small power allowance while muting aggression and public momentum.

effects.note: First-wave guardrail correction from the +0.006 draft keeps Team cross-branch authored CAR advantage at or below +0.015.

nodes.name: Underdog Hero
nodes.description: Gain low-tier opportunities while carrying a reputation penalty in top-tier machinery.
benefits: Low-tier offer weight +0.25 when pinned budget tier is 2 or lower
drawbacks: Reputation -15% when pinned budget tier is 4 or higher
No live team-name inference is permitted.

nodes.name: Journeyman
nodes.description: Convert experience into broad seat access while doubling age-related offer risk.
benefits: Reputation floor relaxed by one tier
drawbacks: Floor relaxation is hard-capped at one tier.

effects.note: A negative tier delta relaxes the required floor; aggregate relaxation is capped at one tier.

nodes.name: Works Prodigy
nodes.description: Raise race and qualifying expectations while slowing signed reputation growth.
drawbacks: raceSkill raises the expected-finish bar; qualifyingSkill is fiction-only for the human.

nodes.name: Garage Interpreter
nodes.description: Translate experience into faster calibration and offers at a visibility and reputation cost.

nodes.name: Trusted Lieutenant
nodes.description: Turn organizational trust into offers and season legacy while accepting lower pay and aggression.

nodes.name: Development Lead
nodes.description: Improve drag and calibration through a heavier, less marketable development role.

nodes.name: Number-One Status
nodes.description: Gain power and launch identity while becoming more expensive and reputation-sensitive.
drawbacks: startReactions is fiction-only for a human driver.

nodes.name: Team Standard
nodes.description: Become a durable organizational benchmark while accepting lower pay and visibility.
drawbacks: Ordinary progression is exclusive with Franchise Driver.

nodes.name: Franchise Driver
nodes.description: Turn franchise status into seat security, reputation, and pay while increasing demands.
benefits: Reputation floor relaxed by one tier
drawbacks: Ordinary progression is exclusive with Team Standard.

effects.note: A negative tier delta relaxes the required floor; aggregate relaxation is capped at one tier.

nodes.name: Media Darling
nodes.description: Turn media attention into marketability and reputation while increasing salary demands.

nodes.name: Quiet Professional
nodes.description: Lower salary demands and project consistency while giving up fame and some offered pay.
drawbacks: consistency is fiction-only for a human driver.

nodes.name: Superstition
nodes.description: Cultivate a memorable deterministic recency identity with less stable form.
drawbacks: This is deterministic recency identity, never an RNG modifier.

nodes.name: Press Trained
nodes.description: Amplify signed round reputation and visibility while increasing salary demands.
drawbacks: Signed reputation amplification also magnifies negative rounds.

effects.note: Multiplies signed reputation, including negative rounds.

nodes.name: Headline Act
nodes.description: Turn volatility into headlines, pay, and reputation while sharply increasing demands.

nodes.name: Crisis Manager
nodes.description: Blunt the career impact of errors while sacrificing visibility and victory XP.
drawbacks: Aggregate error-floor blend is capped at 0.60.

nodes.name: Sponsor Spokesperson
nodes.description: Convert sponsor visibility into portable budget at a contract and consistency cost.
drawbacks: Portable budget bonus is capped at +5 BU.

nodes.name: Respected Voice
nodes.description: Turn experience and longevity into season reputation while accepting lower pay and visibility.

nodes.name: Global Icon
nodes.description: Maximize fame, reputation, and offered pay while becoming volatile and expensive.
drawbacks: Ordinary progression is exclusive with Paddock Authority.

nodes.name: Paddock Authority
nodes.description: Use senior authority to secure seats and legacy rather than pay or mass appeal.
drawbacks: Ordinary progression is exclusive with Global Icon.

nodes.name: Wonderkid
nodes.description: Learn rapidly before the aging peak and slowly afterward.
drawbacks: At or after peak: all per-round XP -25%

nodes.name: Late Bloomer
nodes.description: Shift the aging peak later and learn faster after it at the cost of early growth.
benefits: At or after peak: all per-round XP +25%

nodes.name: Signature Focus
nodes.description: Deepen the persisted flavor specialty while lowering the ultimate stat ceiling.
drawbacks: The authored flavor choice must be persisted.

nodes.name: Adaptable
nodes.description: Slow decline and gain a post-transition race identity while accepting lower round XP.
drawbacks: The transition benefit remains dormant until a versioned journaled transition evaluator exists.

effects.note: May activate only from a persisted, progression-versioned transition flag.

nodes.name: Mechanical Dialect
nodes.description: Trade equal authored power and drag deltas without class-name inference.

nodes.name: Long Memory
nodes.description: Turn experience into offers and season reputation while slowing calibration and reducing pay.

nodes.name: Period Specialist
nodes.description: Deepen the chosen era flavor and round reputation while lowering ceiling and XP.

nodes.name: Reinvention
nodes.description: Recalibrate quickly and slow decline while accepting less stable form and slower learning.

nodes.name: Era-Defining Style
nodes.description: Turn a signature style into era-wide reputation at a severe XP and salary cost.
drawbacks: Ordinary progression is exclusive with Timeless Competitor.

nodes.name: Timeless Competitor
nodes.description: Extend competitive longevity while accepting lower XP and salary offers.
drawbacks: Ordinary progression is exclusive with Era-Defining Style.
